name: MAC-10 | 绯红镂刻
descriptionEn: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. A red millefleur hydrographic has been applied. Perhaps this is one piece of art better left in the past
descriptionZh: 本质上就是个能射出子弹的盒子，MAC-10 微型冲锋枪拥有高频率的射速，作为交换，它还拥有略逊一筹的精准度和高后坐力。 这把武器使用了自定义涂装，表面喷涂有斑驳的绯红花纹。 来自过去的艺术
